original_question:
Lucy has $25$ dollars and $50$ cents. She wants to buy as many notebooks as she can with her money. Each notebook costs $2$ dollars and $40$ cents. How many notebooks can she buy?

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
